chief_complaint: A 28-year-old pregnant woman at 32 weeks 4 days gestation presented with diabetic ketoacidosis and hypertriglyceridemic acute pancreatitis.
history: The patient had a history of gestational diabetes mellitus. She developed diabetic ketoacidosis and hypertriglyceridemic acute pancreatitis, necessitating an emergency cesarean section.
exam: Vital signs: not provided. Physical examination findings: not provided.
correct_diagnosis: Diabetic ketoacidosis with hypertriglyceridemic acute pancreatitis
differentials: Diabetic ketoacidosis with hypertriglyceridemic acute pancreatitis
correct_ranking: Diabetic ketoacidosis with hypertriglyceridemic acute pancreatitis
